creator: swordsman@csjewell.fastmail.us
text:
When

# cd /usr/ports
# make TEMPLATES=/root/templates readmes

is executed, the README.top and README.category templates in the /root/templates diretory are used, but the README.port template is not - the one from /usr/ports/Templates is used instead.

Fix: The two patch files attached will solve the problem. (One is attached now, one will be attached soon.)

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Create template files in a non-default directory (specified below as /root/templates) and then:

# cd /usr/ports
# make TEMPLATES=/root/templates readmes
